context_text: <A> from my point of view though you know they they all make enough money and no matter what their problems are between the the players and the management and the owners it's something that they should be able to uh be able to settle without having to go to strike and without having to uh cause the people the fans people that put their money in the pockets you know cause to or cause them to to miss out on things like that i mean it's what they do for a living is play games and { that } / <B> [ uh-huh ] / <A> stuff you know people the people that pay their salaries go to work all day and then come home and watch those games you know { the the } / <B> [ absolutely ] / <A> players you know their work is they get up at and they have to be at the field at two o'clock in the afternoon take some batting practice or shoot { a } / <B> [ yeah ] / <A> round and things like that / <B> ah
